instruction: Send short follow-up email to Alex Meyer about next steps on the expansion. Keep the diff focused.

steps.result_preview:
accounts/acct_001.json:14:  "notes": "Procured after their COO met John at a digital health roundtable in Berlin and asked for help reducing triage backlog across two pilot clinics. The deal started as a paid discovery, then converted into a platform subscription after the nursing ops team pushed internally for a longer rollout. Procurement is still slow because legal insists on a DPA review before any scope expansion. Related note file: 01_notes/nordlicht-health.md",
